query: UPDATE users SET username = 'admin' WHERE id = 1; UPDATE users SET username = 'liuda' WHERE id = 49; UPDATE users SET username = 'wangyiqin' WHERE id = 79; ALTER TABLE users ADD CONSTRAINT users_username_unique UNIQUE(username); ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN openId; ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN loginMethod;
